metadata.description: A lean frontend design-and-ship skill library for Claude Code.

plugins.name: personal-skills
plugins.description: Generic, repo-agnostic skills: the-one-move, improve-platform and ui-check commands, the impeccable build engine, the taste suite, ui-ux-pro-max, audit primitives, bootstrap-vps-deploy, and a generic quality/token-efficiency/UX workflow — corpus-flow (LLM-maintained wiki + briefs lifecycle) + plan-split-dispatch (model-routed subagent dispatch: hard→opus/easy→sonnet) + orchestrate (/orchestrate — work-intake router that ensures a corpus/ workspace, reads corpus/routing.md, and routes capture→corpus-flow, build→plan-split-dispatch, query→wiki). See ATTRIBUTION.md.
